description: An interior scene of a vaulted stone chamber with arched windows letting in pale light. A group of bearded men in traditional Russian boyar garments sit and stand around a long table covered with a cloth. One figure stands at left near a column, while others are seated in discussion around the table. A lamp hangs from above. The atmosphere is somber and deliberative, rendered in muted sepia and brown tones with watercolor technique. The inscription at the bottom right reads in Cyrillic.
